title: Israeli Leader Says He and Trump Agree On Blocking an Iranian Nuclear Weapon
summary_full: Analysts said Israel was worried that a potential agreement would not significantly degrade Iran’s nuclear and missile capabilities.
summary_public: Analysts said Israel was worried that a potential agreement would not significantly degrade Iran’s nuclear and missile capabilities.
